# Salvador Recuero

Salvador Recuero is a Senior Full-Stack Engineer based in Uruguay / Argentina, available for remote software engineering opportunities.

He specializes in TypeScript, React, Next.js, Astro, Node.js, NestJS, Express, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, testing, CI/CD, Docker, Linux, and Cloudflare-based deployments.

Salvador has 5 years of professional experience building modern web applications, including products across AI-analyzed news, AI-powered search, and AI model management. His recent work includes contributing to platforms for training, validating, and deploying AI models.

## Best match roles

* Senior Full-Stack Engineer
* Senior Frontend Engineer
* Product-minded Software Engineer
* React / Next.js Engineer
* TypeScript Engineer
* AI product engineer
* Remote software engineer for US or international teams

## Strengths

* Builds full-stack applications from scratch, from architecture and UI/UX to production release.
* Strong frontend ownership with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Astro, and Tailwind CSS.
* Backend experience with Node.js, NestJS, Express, PostgreSQL, and API integrations.
* Experience with AI-related products, including AI-powered search and model training, validation, and deployment workflows.
* Comfortable acting as a bridge between engineering, product, design, and client stakeholders.
* Uses AI-assisted development workflows with Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to improve implementation speed, code quality, and product iteration.
* Remote-friendly, English-speaking, and experienced working with distributed teams.

## Availability and rate

* Available for remote software engineering opportunities.
* Typical rate: USD 25–40/hour, depending on role, scope, complexity, and engagement type.
* Open to contract, freelance, part-time, and full-time opportunities.

## Contact

* Website: https://www.salvarecuero.dev
* Email: [contact@salvarecuero.dev](mailto:contact@salvarecuero.dev)
* Location: Uruguay / Argentina
* Languages: Spanish native, English C1
